name: Ivanti Neurons Platform
summary: Unified platform layer that brings together service management, endpoint operations, security and automation on a shared, cloud-native foundation.
interviewThemes: Why a platform approach matters across IT and security
How shared data and workflows reduce silos
How to explain value without overselling AI
When to start broad versus start deep in rollout

name: Ivanti Neurons for ITSM
summary: Flexible service management platform for incidents, requests, change, problem, knowledge, self-service and automation-driven support experiences.

name: Ivanti Neurons for MDM
summary: Modern device management platform covering enrollment, policies, compliance, app distribution and security controls for a broad mix of endpoint types.
interviewThemes: App deployment readiness and staged rollouts

name: Ivanti Neurons for UEM
summary: Unified endpoint management capability that combines visibility, self-healing, self-securing and personalized endpoint operations at scale.
interviewThemes: Moving from reactive support to proactive operations
Endpoint health reporting and value storytelling
Integration between endpoint actions and service response

name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager
summary: Established endpoint management toolset for inventory, software distribution, OS deployment, patching and device administration across managed environments.

name: Ivanti Neurons for Healing
summary: Automation capability focused on detecting, diagnosing and resolving endpoint issues automatically so support teams can reduce repetitive work.
interviewThemes: Choosing the right issues to self-heal

name: Ivanti Neurons for Edge Intelligence
summary: Real-time endpoint intelligence and observability capability used to identify patterns, understand issues and drive better endpoint decisions.
interviewThemes: Communicating analytics value to non-technical stakeholders

name: Ivanti Velocity
summary: Modernizes telnet and web applications for mobile operations and enables more efficient workflows in warehouse, distribution and field environments.
interviewThemes: Business case for modernizing host-based workflows
Testing on rugged devices and peripherals

name: Ivanti Security Controls
summary: Security-focused product area for patching and securing devices with policy-driven controls and vulnerability reduction strategies.
interviewThemes: How security operations interact with endpoint operations
Balancing security urgency with operational stability

name: Ivanti Risk-Based Vulnerability Management
summary: Supports vulnerability prioritization and risk-based remediation planning to focus teams on exposures with the highest practical impact.
interviewThemes: Coordinating with endpoint and service processes

name: Ivanti Neurons iPaaS
summary: Integration capability intended to accelerate workflow connections across external applications and reduce dependency on one-off custom build patterns.
interviewThemes: When to use platform integration versus bespoke API work

name: Ivanti Neurons Workspace and Experience Capabilities
summary: Experience-oriented capabilities that support more efficient self-service, user guidance and productivity improvements across endpoint and service contexts.
interviewThemes: How better experience reduces support effort
Where self-service fits and where it fails
